References

  • [CorLeiRiv96] "Introduction to Algorithms", T. H. Cormen, C. E. Leiserson and R. L. Rivest, The MIT Press, 1996.

  • [EvalHasPea93] "Statistical Distributions, Second Ed.", M. Evans, N. Hastings, and B. Peacock, John Wiley and Sons, Inc., New York, 1993.

  • [Knu] "The Art of Computer Programming. Volume 2, Seminumerical Algorithms", 2nd Ed. D. E. Knuth,

  • [LewDen91] "Data Structures and Their Algorithms", Lewis and Denenberg, Harper Collins, 1991, pp 243-251.

  • [ParMil88] "Random Number Generators: Good Ones are Hard to Find" Park, Steven K. and Miller, Keith W., Communications of the ACM, October, 1988.

  • [SleTar85] "Self-adjusting Binary Search Trees" Sleator and Tarjan, JACM Volume 32, No 3, July 1985, pp 652-686.

  • [Wei92] "Data Structure and Algorithm Analysis", Mark Weiss, Benjamin Cummins, 1992, pp 119-130.

  • [Woo93] "Data Structures, Algorithms, and Performance", Derick Wood, Addison-Wesley, 1993, pp 367-375.
